tests.command: npm --prefix server test -- adapters local-db payment
tests.observed: PowerShell blocked npm.ps1 before project code ran.
tests.equivalentCommand: npm.cmd --prefix server test -- adapters local-db payment

tests.command: npm.cmd --prefix server test -- adapters local-db payment

pageEvidence.summary: T02 has no page route ownership; page jumps and route controls remain assigned to T06-T12. The adapter evidence proves backend state used by those future routes.

apiEvidence.summary: Adapter-level calls model POST /api/payments/create and POST /api/payments/wechat/callback with local mock payment params and idempotent callback behavior.
Adapter-level local cloud upload/download records the upload_files side effect that later upload APIs will call.

dbEvidence.summary: users, diagnosis_orders, upload_files, ai_analysis_tasks, diagnosis_decisions, payments, report_exports, and feedbacks were mutated and independently read back.
Payment callback mutated payments and diagnosis_orders; readback shows accessLevel=basic and status=basic_paid.

visualEvidence.summary: T02 is backend-adapters only; screenshot capture and diff metrics remain assigned to T14.

ownerJourneyEvidence.summary: T02 proves local adapter mutations/readbacks used by owner scenarios; O01-O12 click traces remain assigned to T15.

localOnlyEvidence.summary: LOCAL_ONLY=true, SCOREMAP_ADAPTER_MODE=local-mock, no forbidden remote call findings, and no secret findings in T02 adapter files.
Tencent Cloud behavior is represented by local-tencent-cloud-mock with remoteCalls=[].
WeChat Pay behavior is represented by local-wechat-pay-mock with remoteCalls=[].

knownGaps.summary: Order/upload/preview HTTP APIs are not in T02 scope.
Payment HTTP routes and entitlement API flow are not in T02 scope.
Visual screenshot/diff evidence is not in T02 scope.
Full parent owner journey click traces are not in T02 scope.
